payload.title: Phase Journal: phase_note_task_suggestions table + propose/convert persistence
payload.summary: Implement deferred SQL table phase_note_task_suggestions and wire propose-tasks-from-phase-notes / convert-phase-note-to-task to structured suggestion rows per journal schema.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL.md defines phase_note_task_suggestions as deferrable; this task completes the data model. Add migration with FK to phase_notes, indexes as needed. Extend propose command to optionally persist structured suggestions; convert reads suggestion rows or inline note payloads. Keep MVP path backward compatible if suggestions table empty.
technicalScope: SQLite migration: phase_note_task_suggestions DDL + indexes
Store/repository methods; transactional convert updates note + suggestion state
Tests: migration idempotency, FK integrity, propose round-trip, convert idempotency
Instruction updates if argv or response shapes change
acceptanceCriteria: Table matches journal columns (title, description, suggested_status, suggested_phase_key, acceptance_criteria_json, timestamps)
propose-tasks-from-phase-notes can persist bounded suggestions without auto-creating execution tasks
convert-phase-note-to-task links suggestion/note and sets converted_task_id on note
No orphan rows on note dismiss/supersede — define behavior in code + tests
Manifest/contracts updated if command outputs change
payload.risk: Medium — schema churn after initial journal ship; coordinate with T100033 completion.

payload.title: Phase Journal: retention, phase-close rules, and cross-phase surfacing defaults
payload.summary: Implement and document retention behavior: default reads target current phase; historical phase requires explicit phaseKey; phase-close expectations for blockers/risk/follow-ups.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL.md Retention section: active blockers/risk/follow-ups must be converted, dismissed, superseded, or carried forward at phase close; ordinary notes queryable by phase but not surfaced by default outside phase; get-phase-context defaults to current kit phase when omitted. Add operator guidance (.ai runbook), tests for default phase inference vs explicit historical query, and optional read-only audit helper listing active critical notes for a phaseKey.
technicalScope: Wire default phaseKey resolution from kit_workspace_status / phase-status when commands omit phaseKey
list-phase-notes / get-phase-context / get-next-actions respect defaults and caps across phases
.ai/runbooks/phase-journal-retention.md (or similar) with phase-close checklist
Tests: no cross-phase bleed in default snapshot/next-actions; explicit historical still works
acceptanceCriteria: Omitting phaseKey uses canonical current phase when inferable; documented when not inferable
Default surfaces exclude prior-phase notes unless explicitly requested
Runbook lists maintainer/agent steps before closing a phase
Converted notes stay linked; dismissed/superseded excluded from default relevance paths
Regression tests cover phase boundary behavior
payload.risk: Medium — wrong default could leak context or hide critical notes.

payload.title: Phase Journal: agent read contract + additive JSON schemas
payload.summary: Update canonical agent-facing contracts and JSON schemas so phaseJournal / phaseContext fields are versioned, additive, bounded, and CI-checked.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL.md Agent read contract: agents must not read SQLite; supported surfaces include get-phase-context, list-phase-notes, agent-session-snapshot, get-next-actions. Deliver stable schema fragments (or shared TypeScript types exported for consumers), update exports/tests that snapshot CLI shapes, and reference AGENTS.md / contract package paths as required by repo conventions.
technicalScope: schemas/ or contracts: phaseJournal summary, phaseContext blocks, note projection subset
Golden tests or schema validation against sample CLI stdout
Cross-links in .ai docs for command projections only
Bump contract version fields if present
acceptanceCriteria: Published schemas/types document required keys, optional keys, max array lengths
CI validates manifests/samples against schemas where applicable
Breaking changes avoided or major version documented
Cursor/SDK consumers can rely on additive fields without sqlite access

payload.title: Phase Journal: expiry (expires_at / expired) and optional update-phase-note
payload.summary: Complete note lifecycle beyond dismiss/supersede: honor expires_at, transition to expired status in reads, optional mutate command for bounded corrections.
payload.description: Data model includes expires_at and status expired; MVP command list omitted explicit expiry/update. Implement filter logic so expired notes excluded from default queries; optional expire-phase-note or batch reconcile; optional update-phase-note limited to summary/details within token caps with audit metadata. Deterministic ordering unchanged.
technicalScope: Read-path filters for expired vs active
Command(s): expire-phase-note and/or update-phase-note with validation
Tests: TTL boundary, idempotency, cannot escalate priority via update if forbidden
Instructions + manifest entries
acceptanceCriteria: Default list/get-phase-context exclude expired unless flag requests them
expires_at in past behaves consistently with expired status
Update path preserves idempotency keys and provenance
No bypass of dismiss/supersede semantics
Contract/schemas updated if new commands land
payload.risk: Low–medium — edge cases on clock / timezone; keep UTC ISO consistent.

payload.title: Phase Journal: secret-safety — redaction integration + validation hardening
payload.summary: Enforce Privacy and secret-safety rules on all Phase Journal writes: reuse kit redaction/secret-guard if present; deterministic rejection patterns for obvious secret shapes.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL.md forbids secrets, tokens, keys, large pasted excerpts, PII. Integrate with existing Workflow Cannon utilities if available; otherwise implement conservative validators (length, entropy heuristics optional) and structured error codes. Cover add-phase-note, run-transition phaseNotes, convert paths that embed description.
technicalScope: Discover and call shared redaction module or add thin phase-journal guard
Unit tests: blocked writes for representative secret patterns; allowed sanitized summaries
Instruction updates: agent-facing prohibition copy
Optional config hook for org-specific patterns
acceptanceCriteria: Writes reject or redact per policy with stable error codes
Transition-attached phaseNotes use same guard as add-phase-note
No plaintext secrets persisted in fixtures/tests
Documented fallback when redaction utility absent
payload.risk: Medium — false positives frustrate agents; tune messages and allow escape hatch via dismiss workflow only after review.

payload.title: Phase Journal: configurable policy for critical note mutations + observability
payload.summary: Optional JSON policyApproval or config gate for dismiss/supersede on priority=critical notes; doctor or phase-status advisory counts for open critical phase notes.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL policy table suggests dismiss/supersede may need sensitivity for critical priority. Implement config-driven requirement (default off matches MVP). Add lightweight observability: doctor optional line or phase-status payload snippet with active critical phase note count for current phase — read-only, bounded.
technicalScope: Kit config key design + validation
Command guard when critical + policy requires approval
doctor --json or phase-status extension field (additive)
Tests for default-off and strict-on paths
acceptanceCriteria: Default behavior unchanged from MVP when config absent
When enabled, dismiss/supersede critical notes require Tier B-style approval per machine-cli-policy alignment
Observability never dumps note bodies; counts only
Instructions document configuration
payload.risk: Low — config misuse could lock operators; document escape via maintainer override path.

payload.title: Phase Journal: golden example-workflow integration test
payload.summary: Automate the journal's Example workflow section as an integration or smoke test: notes + transition attachment + cross-agent reads + propose/convert path.
payload.description: PHASE_JOURNAL.md lists steps 1–10 from task start through get-phase-context, add-phase-note, run-transition phaseNotes, agent-session-snapshot, get-next-actions suggestions, convert to proposed task. Implement one deterministic test (Node test or fixture DB) that exercises the chain without manual chat; gate regressions on Phase Journal behavior.
technicalScope: Fixture planning SQLite or in-memory harness per repo patterns
Scripted wk run invocations or direct module calls where faster
Assertions on bounded JSON shapes only
Document how to run in CONTRIBUTING or module README
acceptanceCriteria: Covers add-phase-note + list/get-phase-context + run-transition phaseNotes minimum
Covers agent-session-snapshot phaseJournal and get-next-actions phaseContext when prior tasks merged
Covers propose-tasks-from-phase-notes + convert-phase-note-to-task happy path
Test passes in CI pre-merge gates
Maps steps to PHASE_JOURNAL.md Example workflow for maintainer traceability
payload.risk: Low — test maintenance cost if CLI JSON shifts; pin schema assertions.
